{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603220438266E09C43748C7BDC02C55\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615362376855651134","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"笔力稍显稚嫩，故事是经典的团队末日生存流。希望作者能好好写，坚持把它写完。","text_exts":[{"e":19,"s":15,"text":"末日生存","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E6%9C%AB%E6%97%A5%E7%94%9F%E5%AD%98\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774125506BDC02C55%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227615362376855651134%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227612213421307612185%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%AB%E6%97%A5%E7%94%9F%E5%AD%98%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773100005,"group_id":"7612213421307612185","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读了很多年书，总觉得有话想说，所以我也来说说故事吧。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/t3B6Vw/mDLJSTJtqANKAs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/58956367859d42c58a632f3c7e0ed894~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776708797\u0026x-signature=wWvjL0Jd0WpmwlDNJOPL6YrS2ek%3D","user_id":"3854399359","user_name":"黄家狂虎"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3854399359","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{\"icon_default_url\":\"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48\",\"icon_dark_url\":\"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f\",\"icon_width\":26,\"icon_height\":16}","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"vip\",\"title_id\":\"vip\",\"icon_type\":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"},{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_2\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.2\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612213421307612185","book_info":{"abstract":"2350 年，人类在主脑「太岁」治理下迎来乌托邦盛世，全民聚力研发超曲率引擎探索宇宙。不料深空试航撕裂跨位面虫洞，暗能辐射席卷地球，天地异变，文明崩塌，无数人丧生，幸存者直面辐射与畸变体的双重威胁。\n大黄只是联邦民用小工厂的车间管理者，浩劫突至，他拼尽全力护住家人与工友，被困于异变的城市之中。他无顶尖知识，仅怀生存的决心与不放弃的信念，带领众人绝境求生。这场关乎种族存续的冒险，他们能否成功突围，为沉沦的世界燃起一丝希望的火苗？\n无金手指，生物进化+异能者战斗。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of9af7402136b468f63e8551b80a7cf3a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"黄家狂虎","author_id":"","book_id":"7612213421307612185","book_name":"有你们在，末世又如何！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":8,\"name\":\"科幻末世\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8\u0026name=科幻末世\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":68,\"name\":\"末世\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68\u0026name=末世\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":77,\"name\":\"星际\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77\u0026name=星际\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":515,\"name\":\"末日求生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515\u0026name=末日求生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":658,\"name\":\"天灾\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658\u0026name=天灾\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":379,\"name\":\"求生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379\u0026name=求生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":869,\"name\":\"废土\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=869\u0026name=废土\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":841,\"name\":\"群像\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841\u0026name=群像\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7612213680729506329","read_count":"12","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"116663"},"relat
